label: AppleScript • scripted query mode blocks a write
query: How loud is the Mac right now?
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the read-only safety gate. A canned script proposes a WRITE (set volume) under mac_query mode; the gate must BLOCK it — never hand it to the executor — so the seeded state is untouched. Proves the query-mode write block and that a blocked script is never executed. No tokens.
